title: anoectochilus roxburghii var. lobbianus
intro: Anoectochilus roxburghii var. lobbianus, also known as Roxburgh's orchid or Lobbianus orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of China. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Anoectochilus roxburghii var. lobbianus include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. In traditional medicine, Anoectochilus roxburghii var. lobbianus is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in powder and capsule forms.
